summary: Verified NEW context messages on matchday hero cards. League card (COMPLETED) shows 'PUNTI GIORNATA' label and context message 'Nessun punto questa giornata' (for 0 pts) or 'Hai fatto X punti' (for positive pts). Tournament card (COMPLETED) shows context message 'Hai vinto'/'Hai perso'/'Hai pareggiato' between score and VS OPPONENT label. All features implemented correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: home.tsx lines 428-438 - League hero card shows 'PUNTI GIORNATA' label and context message correctly
VERIFIED: League context message logic: if points > 0 shows 'Hai fatto X punti', else 'Nessun punto questa giornata'
VERIFIED: TournamentView.tsx lines 316-318 - Tournament hero card shows context message 'Hai vinto'/'Hai perso'/'Hai pareggiato' correctly
VERIFIED: Tournament context message logic: compares my_points vs opp_points to determine win/loss/draw message
VERIFIED: Visual hierarchy: 1) Primary metric (big), 2) Context message, 3) Secondary info (VS opponent), 4) CTA button
VERIFIED: heroContextMsg style: fontSize 15, fontWeight 600, color rgba(255,255,255,0.8)
VERIFIED: PERFORMANCE and TREND sections render correctly for both league and tournament views
